channel.title: Color Grade on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Color Grade on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to color grade videos with cinematic filters using smartphones.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-Ve7XVMwFo68/Y9gF401QoqI/AAAAAAAAQiU/-UNylGlG1pY2QSRmz69RsOpOHvxa3MxzgCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1675101664300764-0.png" alt=""> Cinema also known as movie which is basically motion pictures of real world objects known as film captured using camera to present a story as per vision of creators at first in beggining era camera used to capture pictures aka photographs in black and white mode but later on many inventors around the world done various different upgrades to camera by adapting to latest technologies in that process we eventually got such cameras which are not only capable of capturing photographs but also films with sound in black and white and color mode, isn’t that amazing?
